meaning: n.(西班牙)里奥哈(红)葡萄酒
examples: So different to all the guys that ply you with rioja.
Rioja has a remarkable capacity to age: this can be cellared for at least 5 years.
The Rioja is more complex, and deeper flavors can be isolated upon further tastings.
He points to Rioja, a small region of Spain in terms of its population.
The other varieties tasted were shiraz, rioja, claret, pinot grigio and sauvignon blanc.
